sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41089" key="e)pistrofi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιστροφ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, title of Aphrodite, <sense id="n41089.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Verticordia,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:40:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.40.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
